headline: Does IFF’s Pet Probiotic and Heart-Health Soy Breakthrough Change The Bull Case For International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF)?
summary: In late March and early April 2026, International Flavors & Fragrances introduced PureStrong, a canine-specific probiotic strain, and secured Food Standards Australia New Zealand approval for a heart health claim on its isolated soy protein, enabling food and beverage makers in Australia and New Zealand to link soy intake with healthy blood cholesterol levels. Together, these launches highlight IFF’s push into science-backed pet wellness and clinically supported plant-based nutrition,...
